name: IEEE Journal / Transactions
description: IEEE journals and transactions (e.g., IEEE TCPMT, TED). Two-column layout, bundled IEEEtran class.

name: IEEE Conference
description: IEEE conference papers (e.g., ECTC, EPTC). Two-column conference format, bundled IEEEtran class.

name: IEEE Letter
description: IEEE letters (short papers such as Electron Device Letters, about 3 pages). Two-column, bundled IEEEtran.

name: IEEE Peer Review (submission)
description: IEEE single-column double-spaced layout for peer-review submission. Switch to the journal option after review.

name: Microelectronics Reliability
description: For submission to Microelectronics Reliability (elsarticle, single-column review mode).

name: J. Manufacturing Processes
description: For submission to the Journal of Manufacturing Processes (elsarticle, single-column review mode).

name: Materials Characterization
description: For submission to Materials Characterization (elsarticle, single-column review mode).

name: J. Alloys and Compounds
description: For submission to the Journal of Alloys and Compounds (elsarticle, single-column review mode).

name: Applied Surface Science
description: For submission to Applied Surface Science (elsarticle, single-column review mode).

name: Elsevier Final (single column)
description: Final typeset preview after acceptance — elsarticle final 3p, single-column.

name: Elsevier Final (two column)
description: Final typeset preview after acceptance — elsarticle final 5p, two-column.

name: Physical Review B
description: Physical Review B — REVTeX 4.2 reprint two-column layout.

name: Physical Review Applied
description: Physical Review Applied — REVTeX 4.2 reprint two-column layout.

name: Journal of Applied Physics
description: AIP Journal of Applied Physics — REVTeX 4.2 (aip,jap) reprint two-column.

name: Applied Physics Letters
description: Applied Physics Letters — REVTeX 4.2 (aip,apl) reprint two-column.

name: APS Preprint (submission)
description: Single-column preprint layout for APS-family peer-review submission (REVTeX 4.2).

name: NeurIPS
description: Neural Information Processing Systems — bundled official style, single-column preprint mode.

name: ICML
description: International Conference on Machine Learning — bundled official style, two-column.

name: CVPR
description: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition — bundled official author-kit style, two-column.

name: ACL / EMNLP / NAACL
description: *ACL-family NLP conferences — bundled official style, two-column.

name: Springer LNCS
description: Springer Lecture Notes in Computer Science proceedings. Single-column, bundled llncs class.

name: Beamer Presentation
description: Slides for conference and seminar presentations (beamer, Madrid theme).

name: Basic Article (single column)
description: Standard article class — drafts, internal reports, general purpose.

name: Basic Article (two column)
description: Standard article two-column layout — journal-style drafts and preprints.

name: Report / Thesis Draft
description: report class — chapter-structured thesis and technical report drafts.

name: Korean Report (kotex)
description: Korean-language document using kotex (Hangul support) — Korean reports and proposals.
